body:
This PR moves the edmf radiation into the dycore, so that TC does less overwriting of dycore components. A step towards #949.

TODO:
 - [x] Add cache for TC radiation structs
 - [x] Extend cache appropriately based on radiation model
 - [x] Don't use TC internals (grid, state) for dycoms radiation
 - [x] Don't use TC internals (grid, state) for TRMM radiation
title: Move tc radiation into dycore

body:
This PR refactors `thermo_state!` so that we can more easily move `set_thermo_state_peq!` logic into `thermo_state!`.

This is a step towards #949.
title: Refactor thermo_state

body:
This pull request sets the compat entry for the `AtmosphericProfilesLibrary` package to `0.1`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
Note: Consider registering a new release of your package immediately after merging this PR, as downstream packages may depend on this for tests to pass.
title: CompatHelper: add new compat entry for AtmosphericProfilesLibrary at version 0.1, (keep existing compat)

body:
This PR updates some compat bounds and our dependencies.

We're still a bit behind with some dependencies:

```

Status `~/dev/ClimaAtmos.jl/examples/Project.toml`
⌃ [8e7c35d0] BlockArrays v0.16.11 (<v0.16.21)
⌅ [2b5f629d] DiffEqBase v6.84.0 (<v6.105.1) [compat]
⌃ [459566f4] DiffEqCallbacks v2.23.1 (<v2.24.2)
⌅ [ffbed154] DocStringExtensions v0.8.6 (<v0.9.1): CloudMicrophysics, DiffEqBase, LoopVectorization, OrdinaryDiffEq, RRTMGP, StochasticDiffEq
⌅ [a98d9a8b] Interpolations v0.13.6 (<v0.14.6): Insolation
⌅ [85f8d34a] NCDatasets v0.11.9 (<v0.12.8): ClimaCoreTempestRemap
⌅ [1dea7af3] OrdinaryDiffEq v5.71.2 (<v6.29.3) [compat]
⌅ [08abe8d2] PrettyTables v1.3.1 (<v2.1.2): NCRegressionTests
⌅ [0bca4576] SciMLBase v1.38.3 (<v1.63.0) [compat]
⌃ [789caeaf] StochasticDiffEq v6.42.0 (<v6.54.0)
```

title: Update dependencies
